column1: # This file documents security alert suppressions with justification.
# Each entry represents a reviewed false positive or accepted risk.
# parseAndSanitize() is an allowlist-based HTML sanitizer that calls cleanNode()
# to remove ALL elements/attributes not in ALLOWED_TAGS/ALLOWED_ATTRS before
# returning the sanitized body. This is safe because:
# 3. javascript: and data: URLs are explicitly blocked
# 4. All links get target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"

column4: Allowlist sanitizer - cleanNode removes dangerous content
